prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant, 430hp stock)** with a **Holley Dominator EFI system** and **FAST LSX intake manifold** for optimized airflow, paired with a **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** and **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch** for high-torque durability. The LS3 will be stroked to **416ci (6.8L)** using a **Callies Compstar crankshaft (4.000" stroke)** and **Mahle forged pistons (11.5:1 compression)** for a target of **650whp on E85** with a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (12psi boost)** and **ID1000x injectors**.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **MagnaFlow** with **409-grade mandrel-bent tubing**, **Borla Pro XS mufflers**, and **JBA long-tube headers (1-7/8" primaries)** to maximize scavenging on the LS3. The system will feature **Vibrant 1799 resonators** for drone suppression and a **custom X-pipe** to enhance mid-range torque. A **Pacesetter oil cooler** and **Setrab 50-row front-mount intercooler** will manage heat under boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (8-position damping)** and **H&R Sport sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** for reduced body roll. The rear subframe will be reinforced with a **Custom Cages bolt-in roll bar** and **Whiteline adjustable panhard rod** to eliminate axle hop. Braking will be upgraded to **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (355mm rotors)** and **2-piston rear calipers (330mm rotors)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for aggressive street/track use. Wheels: **BBS CH-R II (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +35 rear)** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (255/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear)** tires.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Omega CD-specific) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon**, paired with **custom 3D-printed side skirts** to match the aggressive stance. The kit will include **custom fender flares (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear)** to accommodate the BBS wheels and Michelin tires.

Custom **carbon fiber hood** by **AeroCatch** with **functional dual NACA ducts** to feed the Harrop supercharger and **LED halo headlights** by **Morimoto XB** with **custom C-shaped DRLs**. The rear will feature a **custom carbon fiber trunk spoiler** (3-piece, adjustable angle) and **Valenti taillights (smoked with sequential turn signals)** for a JDM-inspired look.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber backs)**, **Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses**, and a **custom roll cage (8-point, bolt-in)** by **Custom Cages** with **red powder-coated finish**. The dashboard will be replaced with a **Motec C127 digital dash** and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (350mm, suede)**. Audio system: **Focal Utopia Be 3-way components** with **JL Audio 12W7 subwoofer** in a **custom sealed enclosure** under the rear seat.
